fullText: JUST IN: British police ban pro-Iran protest in London, citing "extreme tensions."

name: Polymarket
fullText: BREAKING: Trump launches tariff investigations into EU, Mexico, China and others — suspecting it will "uncover a variety of unfair trading practices."

name: Box (mainnet arc)
fullText:
用Perplexity Computer的20一个月套餐构建一个网站，4次对话直接积分基本耗尽。

网站非常简单，但是做的还是差强人意。

研究了一下，感觉其实就是内置了一些skill和tool的agent，当然，还带了多个模型可以切换，还能调用图片和视频模型生成。 https://t.co/UFMPImyqZG

name: HashKey Group
fullText:
🔍 Tim Sun @TiezhuCrypto, Senior Researcher at HashKey Group, shared on @FTChinese that two infrastructure capabilities will determine whether #RWA can scale:

1️⃣ Programmable compliance
Standards like ERC-3643 embed KYC, AML, investor eligibility, and transfer rules directly
